name: Apache ECharts
when_to_use: 需要 brush 联动筛选 / 下钻 / geo choropleth(registerMap 吃 GeoJSON,无瓦片)/ 大数据 dataZoom sampling 缩放,或 sankey·treemap·sunburst·parallel·candlestick 这类复合图时用它,而非手写 SVG——这几类是 AI 徒手 0% 成功区。静态柱线饼别用它(命中 taxonomy 避开列表,原生手写够用)。
why_valuable: brush 联动、下钻、geo choropleth、大数据 sampling、复合图(sankey/treemap/sunburst)是 AI 徒手 SVG 的 0% 区;单一 option JSON 覆盖 data-explore 多簇。AI 默认只能做到静态柱线饼 70-80%,交互/geo/大数据完全做不到。

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-written SVG when you need linked brush filtering, drill-down, a geo choropleth (registerMap consumes GeoJSON, with no tiles), large-data dataZoom sampling, or compound charts such as sankey, treemap, sunburst, parallel, or candlestick; these are 0% success areas for hand-written AI output. Do not use it for static bar, line, or pie charts (the taxonomy exclusion list applies; native hand-written output is sufficient).
en.why_valuable: Linked brushing, drill-down, geo choropleths, large-data sampling, and compound charts (sankey/treemap/sunburst) are 0% areas for hand-written AI SVG; a single option JSON covers several data-exploration families. AI normally reaches only 70-80% on static bar, line, and pie charts and cannot deliver the interaction, geo, or large-data cases.

data_in.note: data_in is the ECharts option object itself, not a separate schema invented here. The paths below are a narrowed set of common options; deeply nested full options are especially error-prone for AI assembly, so an example is required (see below).

spec.note: echarts.init requires an explicitly sized container (rule 3 forbids vh or percentage heights); default height is 400px and AI may override it. Call chart.resize() after window or container changes.

data_in.note: data_in 就是 ECharts 的 option 对象(不是我们另立的 schema)。下面是裁剪版高频路径;全量 option 深嵌套是 AI 拼装出错重灾区,故 example 必带(见下)。

spec.note: echarts.init 需显式尺寸容器(铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高);默认 height 400px,AI 可覆盖。窗口/容器变化须 chart.resize()。

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe fragment):ESM import jsDelivr /npm/ + echarts.init + setOption。

example._why: 深 config / 高歧义组件:裁剪 schema 往往欠定,minimal example 才是 AI 一次拼对的关键。

carriers.widget: conditional:需落 shadow 容器再 init;ECharts 本身 ZF-clean(canvas + tooltip 皆在容器内,零 head 注入)
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + canvas,无 uplink 需求
